productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Men Stripes Grey Shirts
description: CompositionBlack and white striped shirt made of 100% cotton, has a spread collar, full buttoned placket, full sleeves with buttoned cuffs, embroidery on the left chest and a curved hemFitComfortWash careDelicate machine wash at 30 degrees using mild detergentDo not dry clean, tumble dry, wring, scrub or bleachDry flat in shadeWarm ironDo not iron directly on print/embroideryImpeccable cuts and a luxury construction is a winning sartorial combination - and this shirt from united colors of benetton has both. Lead yourself to a new generation of style and sophistication with this cotton shirt. Pair it with straight fit formal trousers, classy accessories and shiny oxfords.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
